summary: Student Directory summary tiles now filter the existing scoped directory for submitted, revision, high-risk, presentation-pending, archive-ready, and archive-failed student rows.
repoEvidence: The Student Directory route already supported status, risk, presentationStatus, archiveStatus, and noMentor filters.
The Student Directory summary rendered No Mentor, Submitted, Needs Revision, Presentation Pending, Archive Ready, Archive Failed, and High Risk as summary-only tiles.
Existing URL-state helpers already persisted scoped Student Directory filters.
changes: Added Student Directory summary tile actions for submitted, revision, high-risk, presentation-pending, archive-ready, and archive-failed filters.
Reused the existing scoped /api/site/students filter route and Student Directory URL sync.
Updated focused workspace coverage plus dashboard and navigation verifiers.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility boundaries changed.
The actions only narrow the already authorized Student Directory result set.
No mutations, migrations, secrets/env files, Cloudflare/OAuth/domain config, deploys, or live data changed.
nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available.
Inspect Review Queue missing-evidence semantics before adding any new queue filter.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Student Directory summary filter actions unless regression removes submitted-students, revision-students, high-risk-students, presentation-pending-students, archive-ready-students, or archive-failed-students presets.
